DatasetTitle: LIVING ARRANGEMENTS BY AGE BY SEX OF HRP
Annotations: 1. A person not living in a couple can be classified as married or in a same-sex civil partnership if they denote their marital or same-sex civil partnership status as married or in a same-sex civil partnership but have no spouse or partner resident in the household.; 2. The living arrangements variable is different to marital or same-sex civil partnership status.  It combines information from both marital or same-sex civil partnership status and the relationship matrix.  Therefore, for example, a person living as part of a 'cohabiting couple' could in fact be married (to someone else) but will not appear as married or separated in this classification.; 3. 'Age' is age at last birthday.
